reason_unusable: Video contains only presentation slides and a person speaking to camera presenting research data about laparoscopic training access and experience in surgical residency programs. No FLS task performance, simulator work, or procedural demonstration is visible. Content includes bar charts (Fig. 1, Fig. 2, Fig. 5) showing survey data on laparoscopic technique availability and resident experience levels, interspersed with talking-head segments. This is a research or educational presentation, not an FLS task performance video.
frame_evidence: All frames show either: (1) presentation slides with research data visualizations regarding surgical training programs, or (2) a person in business attire speaking directly to camera. No trainer box, instruments, or FLS equipment visible.
